$comment: Coaching-History fixture sidecar (docs/coaching-history.md) — a NON-governed project (no execution.gate_events), so execution.finding_dispositions was written by the direct writer. It carries the recorded 'deferred' dispositions the Coaching History artifact's H2 provenance resolves against: F-P2-03 deferred across the unbroken session run 1-2-3 (the folded last-event-wins record keeps session=3, with the full deferral history in `sessions` for the consecutive-run proof). coaching_history_seq is the ONE permitted coaching-history sidecar key (H5.v) — a scalar-in-sidecar, like execution.state_version; it is dropped on `delete` (H6). NO other coaching material lives here (the machine-facing sidecar is where a coach-only shadow would accumulate — H5.v walks it).

F-P2-03.reason: the antagonist-motive rework needs the middle to settle first
